We also cover the NBA, NFL, Futbol, and the latest sports news. Our mission is to spread Latino culture, passion, and love for the game while giving a platform to players and fans. We share stories from generations who grew up with sports and celebrate the memories that make the game special. Cleats y Cultura is where sports, stories, and culture come together!

title: The Weirdos Next Door
author: PapaBear
description:
Hello, All You Wonderfully Wacky Weirdos!! 
We are PapaBear and littlebear. A Boomer/Millenial couple with a 31-year Age-Gap Relationship sharing our "Bookend Perspectives" on life, love and social norms. Join us and see how two Weirdos from two different generations can learn and grow together! 
Check out our website: weirdosonline.com 
EMAIL US: TheWeirdosNextDoorPodcast@gmail.com   
Music by 1tamara2 from Pixabay

title: Wellness Minutes
author: Dr. Gitika Talwar, PhD
description:
Looking for a short mental health podcast you can actually fit into your day? Wellness Minutes is designed for busy people who know stress, burnout, and overwhelm—but want quick, practical ways to feel better.


Hosted by an Indian Clinical-Community Psychologist based in the U.S., each short episode ( under 7 minutes) offers guided practices and bite-sized wisdom from psychology, neuroscience, and spirituality. Whether you need fast stress relief, a quick mindfulness break, or simple coping strategies for burnout, this podcast gives you tools you can use right away.


Think of it as your pocket-sized wellness companion: short, calming, and grounded in evidence-based mental health practices. Each episode is an invitation to pause, breathe, and bring more balance into your everyday life—no matter how busy things get.


RSSVERIFY

title: FTAHK Podcast
author: FinTech Association of Hong Kong
description: The official podcast of the FinTech Association of Hong Kong brings together policy makers, visionary founders, and institutional leaders to decode the trends, tech, and regulations shaping Asia’s premier financial hub.

title: Nerd Out with Gina!
author: Gina Soldano
description:
Have you ever lost hours researching the name of a plant you once saw ten years ago, or how to build a chicken coop, or maybe the comprehensive history behind the postage stamp? 
This podcast is for nerds by nerds, who are just here to geek out about our obsessions. Authors write whole books about the things that they can't stop thinking about. I'm here to ask them all the questions because if you're here, you love learning about unexpected factoids, forgotten history, and getting lost in the details.

title: Still Standing
author: Adrianne
description:
Still Standing with Adrianne is a podcast about healing, hope, faith, motherhood, and becoming. Through honest conversations and everyday stories, Adrianne explores what it means to keep growing through life's hardest seasons. If you've ever wondered who you are beyond your titles or needed a reminder that you're not alone, pull up a chair.
Come as you are. Leave a little lighter.

title: The Practical Overthinker
author: Tanya
description:
Helping overthinkers get unstuck.
Simple tools for a clearer mind, less overwhelm and more action.
Practical ideas to help you stop spiralling and start moving forward.

title: The Sober Living Podcast
author: The Sober Living Podcast
description: This show focuses on Sobriety and the AA Daily Reflections

title: PoP Pod
author: Kate
description:
PoP Pod is the clinician edition of Prescribe or Pass an evidence-based podcast for pharmacists, pharmacy students and other clinicians who work with medicines.

Hosted by Australian pharmacist, educator and science communicator Kate Thomas, each episode explores one medicine, one condition or one clinical concept, explaining not just what we do, but why we do it.

Expect practical pharmacology, clinical reasoning, patient counselling, common misconceptions, adverse effects, ethical reflection and the questions that arise in real-world practice.

Some episodes stand alone. Others form structured educational series, with reflective questions to support continuing professional development.

Clear, practical and independent, PoP Pod helps clinicians build confidence, challenge assumptions and communicate medicines information more effectively.

title: The Wanderers’ Grace Podcast.
author: Nathan Aluchio
description:
The Wanderers’ Grace is a reminder that nobody is too far gone for God to reach or restore. It signifies the pursuit of who wandered from the truth with focus on reconciliation through repentance and also signifies that in the season of spiritual wandering, grace is present to provide hope and sustenance. 
This is the Grace that meets the wanderer and offers a way back to having a relationship with God. Like the story of the prodigal son, it shows acceptance, not by merit but through kindness and mercy.

title: Mobile Adventure Gaming
author: Chloe Bennett
description: Mobile Adventure Gaming is a podcast for players who enjoy adventure games on mobile devices. Each episode covers gameplay, game updates, tips, mechanics, and interesting features from popular platform and open-world games. If you enjoy learning about mobile games and hearing honest discussions from a fellow player, you're in the right place.

title: Waking Up in Heartbreak
author: LiYana Silver
description: Extraordinary conversations and tools for getting through (not getting over) heartbreak, reclaiming what you lost along the way, and emerging awake, alive, and lit-up.

title: Target Your Happy
author: Stephanie Bredenkamp
description: Target Your Happy is a weekly podcast hosted by Stephanie Bredenkamp - a coach, actor and mum of two under three running a real-life one-year experiment to see whether happiness is something we can target even on the hard days. Follow along with the weekly experiments for practical tips, honest reflections and activities you can try in your own life. 52 weeks. 52 experiments. 52 opportunities for more happiness.

title: 2nd Dojo
author: Batman O'Brien/ Stephen Milton
description:
Batman O’Brien and Stephen Milton team up once again to explore martial arts, eastern medicine and mental health in this new and improved.
Batman O’Brien is a Martial Artist, Acupuncturist, Herbalist and Coach dedicated to improving every aspect of people’s health. He is also legally Batman… Really. 
Stephen Milton is a Psychotherapist in training, Reiki Master, Martial Arts instructor and Dad. He has a background in media and all things audio related.

title: The Catapult Code
author: Qapita Fintech
description:
There's a chapter of every founder's story that never gets told. Not the beginning. Not the headline. The part in between i.e. the pivots, the orbit shifts, the crucible moments. 

 

At Qapita, we've set out to capture it with the same instincts that drive us: curiosity, innovation, trust - For founders, operators, investors, and anyone curious about how great businesses really get built. 

 

Curious? Coming very soon. Stay tuned.

title: UNBEARABLY BULLISH
author: THE BULL YOU CAN'T BEAR
description:
Welcome to Unbearably Bullish, the official podcast of The Bull You Can't Bear—where Wall Street meets relentless energy. Hosted by Donald Johns, this show explores the intersection of investing, entrepreneurship, networking, mindset, AI, business growth, and wealth creation. Every episode is built around one mission: helping you identify opportunity, build meaningful relationships, and take action. Through powerful conversations, market insights, and real-world strategies, you'll learn how to Connect. Collaborate. Monetize. 
Strong Markets. Stronger Mindset. Unlimited Opportunity.

title: Riles To Riles
author: Riley Delgatto
description:
Riles to Riles is a podcast about life, growth, and figuring things out along the way. I’m a 23-year-old sharing my thoughts, experiences, lessons learned, and the journey of reconnecting with my inner child.
From hobbies and personal challenges to moments of reflection and trying to become a better version of myself, this podcast is about embracing the process and leveling up one day at a time.

title: Sleepless History: Sleep Documentaries
author: Trevor Scott
description:
Telling interesting stories of the past to inherit their ingenuity and avoid their mistakes.
I make history stories just interesting enough to fall asleep to. I independently research, review, and edit all the content posted on this channel. Don't forget to follow!

title: History's Darkest Hours
author: Sean James
description: An immersive cinematic history podcast. Not just what happened but what it felt like to be there.

title: Spill The Milk
author: Lucy & Danni
description:
Welcome to our community podcast, where we shine a spotlight on the inspiring people and small businesses that make our local area thrive.


Each episode features conversations with local entrepreneurs, community leaders, and everyday individuals who are making a positive impact. We share their stories, celebrate their successes, and explore the challenges they’ve overcome along the way.


Our mission is simple. to strengthen community connections, support local businesses and inspire people to help one another. By giving local voices a platform, we hope to encourage collaboration, create opportunities and remind us all of the incredible talent, resilience and kindness that exists right on our doorstep.


Join us as we champion local success stories and build a stronger, more connected community, one conversation at a time.

title: DiploEnvoy
author: Zakiya
description:
DiploEnvoy explores fashion, art, sport, culture, and the many ways nations connect beyond formal diplomacy. Through the lens of soft power, we examine how traditions, creativity, and human exchange shape relationships across borders.

Our first project, Caftan Éternal, explores diplomacy through fashion. The patience, craftsmanship, and care required to weave a Moroccan caftan mirror the qualities needed to build enduring relationships between nations. More than a garment, the caftan serves as a cultural ambassador, reflecting centuries of exchange, influence, and connection that continue to shape Morocco's place in the world.

title: There Are Only 12 Notes: Leadership Lessons From Music
author: Paul Nicholson
description: There Are Only 12 Notes explores leadership, creativity, change, resilience, and teamwork through the lens of music. Hosted by Paul Nicholson, author of the new book "There Are Only 12 Notes: Leadership Lessons from Music." There Are Only 12 Notes, the podcast is built around a simple idea: the most complex performances, organizations, and careers are often built from a surprisingly small set of fundamentals. In music, every song begins with the same twelve notes. In leadership, the same principle applies. Clarity, rhythm, trust, listening, adaptation, and purpose are often what separate noise

title: MrsNunes Podcast
author: Jadene
description:
Mrs. Nunes Podcast

Welcome to the Mrs. Nunes Podcast, a space where real life, personal growth, family, education, entrepreneurship, and inspiration come together. Hosted by Jadene Nunes, a devoted wife, mother of three, social work student, and business owner, this podcast explores the everyday challenges and victories that shape our lives.

Each episode offers honest conversations, practical advice, motivational stories, and valuable insights on balancing family, pursuing higher education, building a successful business, and overcoming obstacles with faith and determination. Whether you’re a parent, student, entrepreneur, caregiver, or someone striving to become the best version of yourself, you’ll find encouragement and inspiration here.

Join Mrs. Nunes as she shares her journey, interviews inspiring guests, and creates meaningful discussions that empower listeners to grow, heal, and succeed.

Real Conversations. Real Growth. Real Inspiration.

title: Honestly, Though with Lala Marie
author: Lala Marie
description: Honestly, Though is a chill space where real life meets real talk. Hosted by Lala Marie, each episode explores the unfiltered moments, everyday thoughts, and honest emotions we don’t always say out loud. No pressure to have it all together—just vibes, growth, and keeping it 100. Come as you are.

title: Snapchat Planets
author: Snapchat Planets
description: Snapchat has changed the concept of friendship with its 8 friends ranking system in space. On Snapchat, your closest friends appear as planets, and it’s simple and enjoyable to see who is at the top of your list of friends. It is based on how much you interact with them. This feature is a creative method for keeping track of friendships and activity on the app.

title: Mouse Management and More
author: Megan Howard
description: Mouse Management and More is part Disney history, part trip-planning masterclass. Host Megan Howard is a travel executive with a personal connection to Disney that goes back to the golden age of animation, and she's here to make sure you stop guessing and start planning the trip you'll talk about forever. From deep-dive Disney resort reviews and rope drop strategy to cruise lines, international destinations, and beyond, this is the insider knowledge your next adventure deserves.

title: The English Podcast
author: English with Evie
description:
A podcast by English with Evie to help make English a part of your daily life. Learn English while you commute to work, wash the dishes or clean your bedroom -- this is a way for adult learner to develop their English skills in a fun and interesting way 🇬🇧
This comprehensible input podcast is hosted by English with Evie, who is from the UK and speaks British English

title: Rice Purity Test Explained: What Your Score Really Says About You
author: Mybusiness Hub
description: Have you ever taken the Rice Purity Test and wondered what your score actually means? In this episode, we explore the history of the Rice Purity Test, how the scoring system works, and why millions of people take it for fun, self-reflection, and comparison with friends. ricepuritytestscores.com

title: Talk With Your Sister
author: Cheyenne Ariel Paez
description:
Welcome to Talk With Your Sister. I’m Cheyenne Ariel Páez, and I’m so glad you’re here. This is a podcast built on the belief that the best conversations don’t happen because someone has all the answers—they happen because someone made room at the table. Here, we’ll slow down long enough to wrestle with the questions that shape a life. We’ll explore faith without pretending, culture without stereotypes, creativity without performance, and the quiet work of becoming more honest, more rooted, and more human. Some days we’ll open Scripture. Other days we’ll unpack a book, revisit a childhood memory, talk about culture, reflect on leadership, or simply sit with an idea that refuses to let us go. Wherever the conversation leads, the goal is always the same: to leave with a little more wisdom, a little more curiosity, and a deeper love for God and for one another. This isn’t a stage. It’s a living room. It’s the conversation that lingers after dinner. The front porch where everyone pulls up another chair. The place where stories are exchanged, perspectives are welcomed, and no one has to earn the right to belong before they speak. So, whether you’re listening on your morning commute, while washing dishes, or taking a walk after a long day, thank you for spending this time with me. Welcome to Talk With Your Sister. There’s always room for one more.

www.speak.community

title: One Eighty Five
author: Harry, Nolan, Dom
description: A pop-culture podcast talking every aspect of movies, TV and entertainment. Hosted by Harrison Flatau, Dominic Dante Rembert, and Nolan Prestler

title: Empowered Marriage Podcast
author: Helen Harrison
description:
About the Empowered Marriage Podcast

The Empowered Marriage Podcast explores self-awareness, belonging, and intentional relationships.

Each episode shares practical tools, evidence-based relationship insights, and real-life strategies to help you strengthen the relationship you have with yourself and with your partner.

Together, we'll explore how to:

Develop greater self-awareness.
Create a stronger sense of belonging within yourself.
Build intentional relationships based on connection, trust, and emotional safety.

Because " The power of change is within you."

About Helen Harrison

Helen Harrison is a Relationship and Personal Growth Specialist, counsellor, psychotherapist, coach, speaker, and #1 Amazon Bestselling Author with over 18 years of experience helping individuals and couples create meaningful, lasting change.

Helen believes every relationship is a reflection of the relationship you have with yourself. Through counselling, psychotherapy, coaching, workshops, speaking, and the Empowered Marriage Podcast, she helps people understand the patterns that keep them stuck, strengthen emotional resilience, and build healthier, more connected relationships.

She is also the author of Inner Wealth: From Pain to Purpose, sharing her personal journey through adoption, loss, trauma, and transformation while offering practical tools for healing and growth.

🌐 Power of Change Counselling & Coaching
https://powerofchange.com.au/

📖 #1 Amazon Bestselling Book – Inner Wealth: From Pain to Purpose
Available in Paperback, Kindle and Audiobook.
https://amzn.to/48DdU3c

title: Retire With Peace
author: Dave Zaegel, CPA, CFP
description:
The Retire With Peace podcast brings you actionable information for your retirement planning. Topics include financial planning, taxes, investments, social security, Medicare, personal health & wellness, and much more.
Join Dave Zaegel, CPA, CFP as he covers various financial and lifestyle topics to help you Retire With Peace.

title: Fuse to Finale: An NFA Podcast
author: Allyson Cowgill
description: From the first spark of an idea to the last shell shot, this show will deep dive into the work, chaos, and creativity that make the NFA expo an unforgettable experience. Whether it’s the inner workings of the fireworks industry, the planning of large-scale events, or the stories of the people who make it all happen, Fuse to Finale pulls back the curtain on what it really takes to deliver the NFA Expo. Because while everyone sees the finale, nobody notices the fuse.

title: Better Than I Found You
author: Megan · Big Mother Energy
description:
Here's the show's long description, jar-free (~830 characters):
This is a podcast about everything you were supposed to have figured out by now.
The laundry. The DMV. The school forms. The mail pile that has its own mail pile. Nobody taught us this stuff — we were all just handed a life and told, figure it out.
I'm Megan. My friends say I have big mother energy — I'm the one you call when you don't know who to call. So I made it a podcast.
Every week I show up at a friend's actual house. We sit on her actual couch — sometimes with her friends piled in as the live audience — and we talk about one adulting "should" nobody warned us about. No experts. No five-step plans. Just real friends admitting that adulting is hard — and laughing anyway.
My intention is simple: by the time we're done, you'll be feeling better than I found you. That's the whole show. That's the power of big mother energy.
New episodes Thursdays. betterthanifoundyou.com

title: Tailwind
author: Austin Buell
description: Tailwind is a series of conversations with business development professionals, sales trainers, and leaders. Hosted by Topsail co-founder Austin Buell.

title: Lois Megan A. Punay's podcast
author: SienaSoul_Daily
description:
SienaSoul_Daily is a Catholic podcast for teens and young adults who are discovering God's call in their lives—whether to the single life, marriage, or religious life. Together we'll explore the Catholic faith, learn about the saints, and have fun conversations with seminarians, pastoral seminarians, priests, religious sisters, and fellow Catholic teens and young adults.

Join us as we grow in faith, share our stories, discover God's will with joy, and pray the Holy Rosary together in both English and Latin as we deepen our relationship with Jesus through the intercession of the Blessed Virgin Mary.

title: #Thoth/Healing Ministry pt 1
author: Kristin Thomas
description:
Focused on healing and the healing space of the moon.

#wisdom

Cover art photo provided by Steve Busch on Unsplash: https://unsplash.com/@sdbusch77?utm_source=spreaker&utm_medium=referral

title: Two Idiots Talking
author: Scott Maruscak, Jason Murawski and Julia Maziarz
description: Three hosts, Jason, Julia and Scott discuss pretty much anything that comes to mind including jobs, money, aching bodies, Mothman, gallbladders, leaving food in the microwave overnight, bad luck, plants as medicine, Renaissance fairs, robbing banks, and generally life and why it’s so messed up.

title: Psychology Decoded
author: Megha Sehgal
description:
Tired of staring at endless pages of study blocks? Psychology Decoded is designed to bring your textbook syllabus to life. This podcast acts as your ultimate companion for the first-year MAPC curriculum, unpacking tough theories, research methodologies, and core concepts into bite-sized audio notes. Plug in, hit play, and decode your psychology coursework wherever you are.
Disclaimer: Created as an independent educational aid utilizing AI synthesis to transform study notes into accessible audio revision tracks.

title: The Power of Big Mother Energy
author: Megan Darrell
description:
Big Mother Energy is what your friends call it when you're the one who picks up the phone — the one with the extra charger, the dinner rec, the "text me when you're home." The one who leaves everything a little better than she found it.
The Power of Big Mother Energy is a network of shows built on one belief: nobody taught us how to be adults, so we figure it out together — out loud, on the couch, laughing.
It starts with our flagship, Better Than I Found You: every week, host Megan shows up at a friend's house, the guest pulls one adulting "should" out of a jar — the dishwasher, the DMV, the mail pile — and that's the episode. No experts. No five-step plans. Just real friends admitting adulting is hard.
More couches are coming. Same promise: you'll leave feeling better than we found you.
New episodes Thursdays. betterthanifoundyou.com

title: Consult Alec
author: Dr Steve Grillo
description: Consult Alec is the essential management and leadership podcast for navigating the chaotic new reality of AI in the workplace. We go beyond the hype of artificial intelligence to tackle the real issues: AI-induced team burnout, broken productivity metrics, and the psychological toll of digital transformation. Each week, Alec and Grace consult with real-world challenges to diagnose hidden workplace friction and prescribe concrete, structural solutions. Learn how to protect your team's mental health, restore professional dignity, and build high-performing cultures in the age of disruptive tech

title: It’s Morphin Time Podcast
author: Trevor Shelley
description:
It’s Morphin Time Podcast is your ultimate destination for everything Power Rangers. From Mighty Morphin to the latest series, we break down episodes, rank Rangers and villains, revisit legendary battles, and dive into the history, lore, and legacy of the Morphin Grid. Whether you’re a lifelong fan or just discovering the franchise, join us as we celebrate the action, the suits, the Zords, and the stories that made Power Rangers a global phenomenon.
Each episode brings discussions, fan theories, rankings, and nostalgia-filled conversations that keep the Morphin spirit alive.

title: Evolving Workforce
author: OAHI Marketing
description:
Work is changing. That's not a prediction anymore. It's just Tuesday. And the leaders doing it well, aren't the ones with all the answers. They're the ones asking better questions.

I'm Dave Kenyon, and this is Evolving Workforce.

Each episode I sit down with the people who are living this stuff, AI strategists, compliance experts, cybersecurity leaders, marketers, and workforce technology practitioners. The ones on the front line of how work is being redesigned right now.

If you're a leader trying to guide your people through change, and let's be honest, we all are, this one's for you. Let's get into it.

title: Married to Radio
author: Double-L
description:
One married the radio.
One married the radio girl. 💜
🎙️ Double-L & Jeremiah
📻 Behind-the-scenes stories of country music, marriage & more.

title: Life's Timing
author: Katie Jané
description: Hey, I’m Katie Jané! I’m all about life’s wild twists and turns—and how, in the end, things somehow work out. In some episodes, I dig into real conversations that teach me (and hopefully you!) something new every time. And in the others, I will serve as your Executive Coach providing you with insights, tips, and motivation to help you unlearn habits that might be holding you back and get inspired to become the best version of yourself. Let’s dive in!

title: Built Not Buzzed
author: Brooke Moran
description: The Business Podcast with no BS. Welcome to the truth on how to build.

title: Haddonfield Radio
author: Haddonfield Radio
description:
The history, legacy and lore of movies, trailers and more.
With hosts Christian White and Joe Francazio.
Welcome to Haddonfield Radio on SPOTIFY! These are audio only versions of our episodes from our YouTube channel. If you are interested in seeing full video versions of the show please head over to YouTube.com/@haddonfieldradio

title: For Good
author: Joseph "JoJo" Simmons
description:
What if healing yourself was the first step to changing the world?
This is a space for grounded, soul-level conversations about mental health, emotional intelligence, personal growth, and what it means to live with intention. Here, healing isn't a trend, it's a lifelong commitment. Through vulnerable storytelling and honest reflection, For Good helps us reconnect with purpose, reimagine legacy, and choose growth — for ourselves, our families, and our communities.
At the heart of it all is Joseph "JoJo" Simmons, the son of hip hop royalty, Rev Run of Run DMC, and a multi-faceted entertainer, entrepreneur, husband, father, and mental health advocate. From MTV's Run's House to Growing Up Hip Hop, JoJo's journey has been public but his evolution has been deeply personal.
After facing public scrutiny in his teens, JoJo took a step back from the spotlight to prioritize his mental health. He reemerged as an advocate, determined to use his platform for good. In 2023, he received the Phoenix Arising Award from the Black Mental Health Alliance, honoring his commitment to wellness and emotional literacy in the Black community.
JoJo brings a rare mix of humility, humor, and heart to every episode. Whether he's speaking solo or sitting with a guest, he creates space for listeners to reflect, reset, and rise together.
Expect episodes that explore the power of emotional intelligence in real life, mental health beyond buzzwords — especially for Black men and fathers, breaking generational cycles through inner work and intention, and what legacy looks like when it's built on love, not ego. You'll also hear honest, unfiltered stories that inspire growth, healing, and a deeper connection to purpose.
Notable guests include:  
Dr. Cheyenne Bryant:  Life coach and psychology expert dropping truth bombs on relationships and accountability  
Lil Eazy-E: Reflecting on his father's legacy and the controversy surrounding his death  
Trell the Trainer: From prison to purpose: using fitness and emotional vulnerability to help Black men heal  
Vanessa Simmons: On protecting her personal life while growing up in a public family  
Steve Lobel: Behind the music industry grind: on hip-hop success, grief, and staying grounded  
Corvain Cooper: From life in prison to presidential pardon: a story of transformation, justice, and second chances  
Jesce Horton: Building one of the most respected Black-owned cannabis brands with Carmelo Anthony  
For Good is a production of 3isFor, a values-driven creative studio founded by childhood friends JoJo Simmons, Kris Karl, and David Dow. The three co-founders come from vastly different backgrounds — hip hop royalty, regenerative farming, and media production — but their values are the same. Together, they build with purpose, tell stories that matter, and champion regenerative business as a model for healing industries, communities, and the planet.
Listen if you care about:  
- Growing from the inside out  
- Breaking cycles and redefining what success looks like  
- Building legacy with intention, presence, and purpose  
- Using your voice and story to create real, lasting impact
New episodes every Tuesday.
Follow @forgoodpodcast on Instagram for behind-the-scenes moments, live convos, and episode drops.
Be for growth. Be for healing. Be For Good.

title: The Grace Edit
author: Grace Beauty
description:
Beauty is an industry, an art form, and a lifestyle and The Grace Edit explores all of it.


Hosted by Grace Beauty, a family-run beauty wholesale company based in New Zealand, The Grace Edit is the podcast built for the people behind the beauty industry. We distribute a carefully curated collection of boutique beauty brands from around the world, spanning professional skincare, gel nails, self-tanning, eye makeup, lash and brow, gut health, and wellness and we've spent years working hand-in-hand with salons, clinics, spas, beauty professionals and retail partners across New Zealand to help them grow.


This podcast is an extension of that mission.


Whether you're a salon owner looking to scale, a beauty therapist building your career, a clinic director navigating the business side of beauty, or a distributor wanting a deeper understanding of the brands you work with, The Grace Edit is for you.


In each episode, we bring you honest education, expert guest conversations, real business support, product deep dives, and the kind of human-to-human insight you don't get from a brochure or a brand deck.


We believe the beauty industry grows when the people in it are supported, informed, and connected. From technique and training to pricing, marketing, mindset, and the stories behind the world's most exciting boutique beauty brands, this is beauty, wholesale, and everything in between.


New episodes every fortnight.


Find out more and shop our full brand range at gracebeauty.co.nz. 


Follow us on Instagram at @grace_beautyltd.

title: Marlins Daily | Daily Miami Marlins Podcast
author: Fan Arch
description: Marlins Daily is not endorsed, sponsored by, or affiliated with MLB or any of its 30 teams. The content of our videos is intended for entertainment and informational purposes only. All teams and players shown or discussed in our videos are registered trademarks of MLB and their respective teams. Any team names, words, trademarks, logos, or photos are used for descriptive purposes only. Welcome to Marlins Daily—your daily source for everything Miami Marlins, hosted by longtime Marlins fan Kurt Semder! 🚀 Join us every day as we break down the latest news, rumors, and updates surrounding your favorite team. From trades and injuries to game recaps, roster moves, and in-depth analysis, Kurt brings his knowledge and passion for the Marlins directly to your screen. Hit the subscribe button and turn on notifications so you never miss an episode. Join the conversation and become part of the Marlins Daily community! Let’s go Marlins! 💯

title: BCSTH Podcast
author: BC Society of Transition Houses
description: BC Society of Transition Houses is happy to launch the BCSTH Podcast. On this show, you will hear reflections on challenges in the gender-based violence sector and how our member organizations are rising to meet them. We will be featuring stories of tough realities, collaboration, innovation, activism and hope in a field where successes are often hard won. Our organization is based in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada on the traditional and unceded territory of the Musqueam (xʷməθkʷəy̓əm) Squamish (Sḵwx̱wú7mesh) and Tsleil-Waututh (səlilwətaɬ) Nations .

title: Into the Forgotten Island
author: Aobble
description: A podcast dedicated to talking about the newest Dreamworks movies!

title: Disruptor Diaries: Healthcare Education Innovation Unleashed
author: Jenn Bodine
description:
Hosted by seasoned nursing professional development (NPD) specialists, our podcast is dedicated to promoting and cultivating inclusive learning environments within the healthcare sector, no matter your job role or specialty.
Join us as we dive deep into the complexities of healthcare education, celebrating success stories and tackling the challenges that create barriers to effective learning. Together, we will uncover valuable resources and tools to empower healthcare professionals to adapt, grow, and excel in this dynamic environment. Whether you're a seasoned practitioner, an emerging healthcare professional, or an educator in the field, "Disruptor Diaries" is designed to inspire and inform you on your journey through the ever-changing world of healthcare.

title: Commonplace Church
author: The Commonplace Church
description: Sermons from Commonplace Church in Fort Collins, CO

title: Lofa Listens
author: Lofa Consulting
description:
Lofa Listens is where the NDIS world talks.


 We sit down with providers, support workers, industry leaders, advocates, and changemakers to discuss the challenges, opportunities, and future of disability services in Australia. Real conversations. Real experiences.

title: Maximize the Moment
author: Walter and Tasha Carter
description:
Every leader faces defining moments — the pivot, the pressure, the breakthrough, the season that stretches you. The question is: will you maximize them?

Maximize the Moment with Tasha & Walter Carter is a podcast for leaders, teams, and organizations in every phase and stage of growth. As business partners, co-founders of Maximized Growth, LLC, and a husband-and-wife team who build side by side, Tasha and Walter bring two distinct voices to one shared table — blending leadership strategy, faith-rooted principle, and real-world experience into conversations you can actually use.

Each week, they unpack the mindset, skills, and systems missing and required to move people and organizations forward — from leading yourself and developing your team to navigating change, building culture, and creating lasting impact. Whether you’re an emerging leader finding your footing, a seasoned executive raising your ceiling, or a team or organization ready to grow together, you’ll walk away with practical takeaways and honest encouragement to lead well right where you are.

Because growth isn’t reserved for the finish line. It happens in the moment — and this is your invitation to maximize it.

New episodes every Wednesday.

🎙️ Presented by Maximized Growth, LLC · www.maximizedgrowthllc.com

title: Conversations with Comfort
author: Comfort Insurance
description:
Conversations with Comfort is your go to series for everything motorhome and campervan.
Hosted by the team at Comfort Insurance, this series brings together expert advice, real-world insights, and practical tips to help you get the most out of van life on the road.
From theft prevention and insurance advice to travel inspiration and maintenance tips, each episode is designed to be useful, and easy to follow, perfect for whether you’re a seasoned motorhomer or just getting started!
Because at Comfort, we’re not just insurers we’re motorhomers too.

title: Before They Take Away My Keys
author: Skip Cohen, Chamira Young
description: "Before They Take Away My Keys" is about late-in-life choices...from updating your bucket list, to healthcare, issues involving elder law, caregiving, creating a legacy program in video and still-photography...and the list goes on and on. Whether you're in your 40s and caring for an older family member or you're already with us old farts - this is about sharing those conversations none of us have often enough with the people who matter most.

title: Beyond the Ladder | Career Coaching, Fulfilment, and Confidence for Corporate Women
author: Alex Dubois
description:
I thought if I worked harder and ticked all the right boxes, I'd finally think, "I've made it." Then I achieved everything I'd wanted… and still found myself wondering, "Is this it?"
If you've ever felt successful on paper but secretly unfulfilled, welcome to Beyond the Ladder — the podcast for ambitious corporate women craving more clarity, fulfilment, and confidence.
I'm Alex Dubois: career coach, senior corporate leader, and working mum who's been exactly where you are.
Together we'll figure out what comes next. Because life is too short to climb a ladder you no longer want to be on.

title: The Boobie Jackson Show
author: Ryvox.ca/boobiejackson
description: ​"Your favorite complaints, unfiltered and turned inside out. Join Boobie Jackson, Ryvox, Greasy Steve, and the crew as they take on everything from terrible drivers to space-traveling liberals. Plug your headphones in—this is The Boobie Jackson Show." Boobie Jackson Show is: Boobie Jackson, Ryvox, Greasy Steve, Dope Soda & Hank Doubleyue!

title: Volley Momma Podcast
author: Conversations with Momma Aimee
description: Sharing real volleyball stories from the court to the sand. I am a volleyball coach and a proud momma to a former D1 college athlete. Having survived and thrived in both roles, I know firsthand that volleyball moms have incredible wisdom to share-whether your child has elite college aspirations, is just starting out at the junior level or currently pursuing a pro career, we will cover it all. Get ready for unfiltered insights, strategy, and community.

title: Vibra Check
author: BERNABE PRODUCTIONS
description:
Welcome to Vibra Check—your new favorite conversational lifestyle podcast. If you’re tired of filtered feeds, scripted conversations, and holding back, you've found your people.
Every episode, we sit down to talk about exactly what’s on your mind. From the latest pop culture drama and internet deep-dives to the raw, beautiful, and sometimes messy reality of relationships, no topic is too big, too small, or too taboo. We're talking about life, love, and everything under the sun with zero filter and absolute honesty.
Whether you need a reality check, a good laugh, or just want to feel like you're hanging out with your best friends, Vibra Check brings the energy. Hit play, get comfortable, and let’s get into it.

title: Más allá del aula pensar el conocimiento
author: Yesika P. Marquez López
description: Más allá del aula: Epistemología y el arte de pensar la educación. ¿Es la educación una simple transmisión de datos o un acto de liberación? En este episodio exploraremos la epistemología como una forma de emancipación a través del conocimiento.

title: The Happiness School Podcast
author: thehappinessschoolpodcast
description:
🎙️ Welcome to The Happiness School Podcast! 🌟

The Happiness School Podcast is a motivational and educational podcast that helps listeners create happier, healthier, and more fulfilling lives. 🎧🗣️Through inspiring conversations, expert interviews, and practical advice, each episode explores topics such as mental well-being, mindfulness, emotional intelligence, personal growth, resilience, and positive habits.

The podcast offers simple, actionable strategies to help listeners manage stress, build confidence, strengthen relationships, and develop a positive mindset. Featuring insights from educators, psychologists, coaches, entrepreneurs, and other inspiring guests, it encourages lifelong learning and self-improvement.

Whether you are looking for motivation, personal development, or tools to improve your everyday life, The Happiness School Podcast provides meaningful guidance and encouragement. It emphasizes that happiness is not a destination but a lifelong journey built through gratitude, self-awareness, kindness, and intentional choices. Every episode inspires listeners to embrace growth, overcome challenges, and live with greater purpose, optimism, balance, and joy.

title: Sports: As A Science
author: LQ
description: Your one-stop for talking the TRUTH behind sports stats. They can't all work... right?

title: Quaker Success: Redefining What It Means to Succeed
author: Craig Berger, Aaron Berger, and Ed Butch
description:
Quaker Success is a podcast hosted by Salem High School (Ohio) alumni Craig Berger '02, Aaron Berger '05, and Ed Butch '02 in partnership with the Salem High School Alumni Association. Each episode consists of a conversation with a Quaker alum that touches on their SHS memories, personal and professional experiences since graduating, and whether they believe they have achieved success. 
In the first season, each guest was voted "Most Likely to Succeed" by their classmates during their senior year.

title: Years of Fear: A History of Horror
author: Michael Kent
description: Years of Fear is a horror history podcast that explores the movies that shaped horror, the people that made them, and the culture that made them possible. Each episode centers on the most important horror films of every year, beginning in 1960 with the first true Slasher film and all the way through the modern era.

title: Behind the Investment
author: TLV Partners
description: Conversations with the founders we back, sharing the real story behind each investment - from the first meeting to the moment of conviction, and what it takes to build enduring companies in the age of AI.

title: Elevating Investor Relations: A Global Conversation
author: Breakwater Capital Markets
description: Elevating Investor Relations: A Global Conversation is a Breakwater Capital Markets podcast meant to enable broader global engagement, conversations, and perspectives across investor relations leader groups, boardrooms, and more. Join Mark Hayes, Partner & Head of the Breakwater Capital Markets Group, and David Grunfeld, Founder & CEO of aiiro AI, as they talk through investor relations issues at a global scale.

title: TALKAHOLISM
author: Kali
description:
Talkaholism is the podcast for people who are more interested in understanding conversations than winning arguments.

 

Every week, we take the stories everyone is talking about—from breaking news and pop culture to politics, technology, sports, and social issues—and explore the bigger human questions behind the headlines.

Instead of asking, "Who's right?" we ask:

 

  • What actually happened?
  • Why has this become such a conversation?
  • What different perspectives are people bringing to it?
  • What does this reveal about us?
  • What question should we still be thinking about after the episode ends?
  •  

Through thoughtful storytelling, factual reporting, and respectful curiosity, Talkaholism maps the conversations shaping our world without telling you what to think.

Because the most interesting part of the news isn't always the headline.

 

It's the conversation that follows.

 

New episodes weekly.

title: The Handle
author: The Professor
description: The Handle Podcast with The Professor.

title: The Resilient Rebels Podcast
author: Amy E Bowker
description:
🎙️ The Resilient Rebels Podcast is where exhausted but hopeful educators come to remember why they started teaching in the first place.
Hosted by Amy Bowker, a former public school teacher turned education rebel, this show is part pep talk, part therapy session, and part professional development — minus the toxic positivity and unpaid hours.
Each week, you’ll get real talk about boundaries, burnout, joy, and rebuilding education from the inside out.

title: Beneath the Water
author: Diane Doersch
description:
Beneath the Water is a leadership podcast hosted by Diane Doersch, a longtime education technology leader, former district technology executive, and community builder who is now in her "rewirement."


In each episode, Diane sits down with education technology leaders for the kind of conversation we do not hear often enough. These are not polished success stories or quick leadership tips. They are honest conversations about what is happening beneath the surface: the moments that shaped her guests, the challenges they had to work through, the lessons they carry, and the parts of leadership that are not always visible from the outside.


This podcast is for leaders who want to feel seen in their work and reminded that they are not alone.

title: She Owns Success
author: She Owns Success
description:
She Owns Success is the podcast focused on what it means to thrive and succeed as a woman today, at work, in business, and in life. Join us for conscious conversations with purpose-driven founders, creators, authors, leaders, coaches, and changemakers who are building success from the inside out.
From mindset and spirituality to entrepreneurship and personal growth, we explore what it really takes to own your path, make a positive impact, and create success on your own terms, whether you're climbing the corporate ladder, building a business, or leading change.

title: UnErased with Trish Lacy
author: Trish Lacy
description: UnErased with Trish Lacy is where healing meets hope. Through authentic conversations about emotional abuse, resilience, leadership, and personal growth, you'll be reminded that your past does not define your future. Reclaim your voice. Rewrite your story. Live UnErased.

title: The Perfect Pour
author: Camille N Moore
description:
Welcome to The Perfect Pour.
I'm so glad you're here.
This space is for honest conversations about the things that matter most — relationships, faith, work, emotional wellness and more — All the small decisions that quietly shape the lives we're building.
Every week, we'll slow down long enough to talk about what's really important. We'll celebrate what's going well, wrestle with the hard stuff, and explore practical ways to grow into the people we want to become. No pressure to have it all together—just real conversations that help us live with a little more purpose and a lot more intention.
My hope is that every episode feels like sitting down with a good friend—one who asks thoughtful questions, tells you the truth with love, and leaves you feeling a little lighter, a little wiser, and a little more intentional than when you arrived.
So, whether you're on your morning commute, taking a walk, or winding down with your favorite drink, I'm so glad you're here.
Let's discover what it looks like to create a life that's worth the pour.

title: Epistemic Disobedience
author: Epistemic Disobedience
description: Epistemic Disobedience is a podcast about the ideas that hold oppressive systems in place, and the thinking required to dismantle them. Hosted by two Africans based in Germany, we take seriously what it means to think from the margins of a system that would prefer we didn’t think at all.

title: Architect My Business
author: Architect My Business
description: Architect My Business (AMB) is a podcast for architects and designers in the AEC who are thinking of starting, already managing or want to take their business to the next level. Hosted by Aya Shlachter, each episode offers simple, actionable tips on leadership, people, marketing, processes, and, of course, profit. Check out our mini-shows: Her Space and Ask Aya!

title: Powermomma Podcast
author: Samantha Hoey Nelson, Tangelia Rouse Ringo
description:
PowerMama: Unleashing the Unstoppable Force of Motherhood—For Good (And for Ourselves)
Welcome to Powermomma: Two Moms, Zero Capes, Infinite Hustle
We're two fierce moms are raising daughters—and ourselves. Every week, we dive into what it really means to channel your inner superhero (cape optional) and show up as the strong, authentic women we were always meant to be.
Motherhood is messy, magical, exhausting, and empowering all at once. It's not just about raising the next generation—it's about rising into our own power too. From the chaos of work-life "balance" (lol), to culture, identity, and those "what did I sign up for?" moments, we get real about the beautiful, complicated juggle of it all.
We laugh, we vent, we cry (sometimes all at once), and we're not afraid to say what everyone's thinking. Expect honest conversations, zero perfection, and lots of heart as we explore how to thrive—not just survive—this wild ride.
So if you're ready to tap into your power, reclaim your identity, and maybe even find some clarity in the chaos, PowerMama is your new go-to. Because our kids deserve it. And frankly? So do we.

title: Sweet Bytes with Sandra
author: Sandra Colton-Medici
description: "Sweet Bytes with Sandra" is a weekly podcast hosted by Dr. Sandra Colton-Medici where she dishes up digestible bytes of digital business tips, funky asides of her time in entertainment, motivating move-your-butt straight talk, simple lifestyle hacks, and a sweet dollop of inspiration to help you obtain increased success for your business.

title: The Modern MILF Podcast
author: Bethany Hale Pearson
description: Hosted by Sex & Relationship Coach, Bethany Hale. This is a progressive and sex positive platform for your sex life and intimate partner relationships, using science-backed research by professionals, personal experiences, and always empowering women to be their inherent sexual selves.

title: Pathway Church NW
author: PATHWAY CHURCH
description:
Welcome to the Pathway Church Podcast!

Each week you'll hear practical, Bible-centered messages from our Sunday morning services designed to help you know Jesus more deeply, grow in your faith, and live with purpose. Whether you're exploring Christianity, new to church, or have been following Jesus for years, these messages will encourage, challenge, and equip you to take your next step with Him.

At Pathway Church, we believe that Jesus is the pathway to life, hope, and lasting transformation. Our desire is to help people find and follow Jesus through authentic worship, biblical teaching, and a welcoming community.

If you're ever in the Graham/Spanaway area, we'd love to meet you in person. Join us Sundays at 10:00 AM!

Thanks for listening, and we pray these messages encourage you wherever you are on your journey.

title: Ready. Set. IVF: Mind-Body Tools for Navigating Fertility Treatments, Surrogacy and Pregnancy Loss
author: Jennifer Robertson
description: Welcome to the No 1 podcast for women navigating IVF. Whether you're preparing for your first cycle or finding your feet again after an unsuccessful one, you need real support from someone who has been there, kicked infertility's butt, and helped hundreds of women do the same. Join Jennifer Robertson, Life Coach for women navigating infertility, for mind-body tools, cycle-by-cycle guidance, expert interviews and frank conversations about grief, relationships and the resilience it takes to keep going, quit second-guessing and ditch the emotional overwhelm.

title: The Deep End
author: Eric Lindquist
description: Below the surface music

title: Bible Reading
author: Bible Reading
description: In this generation, it has become increasingly difficult to slow down, focus, and meditate on God's Word. We live in a busy world where work, responsibilities, social media, and endless distractions constantly compete for our attention. Before we know it, an entire day has passed without spending even a few quiet moments with God. This podcast was created to help you reconnect with Scripture. Whether you're driving, working, studying, or simply taking time to rest, you can listen to God's Word and let it fill your heart and mind. God bless you.

title: What Lies in Wait
author: A. Arch Pingel & Yvianca Robinson
description:
A private investigator must unravel the truth behind a man's mysterious disappearance in a small Savannah town, only to find herself caught in a deadly clash between ancient forces and dark superstitions.

(warning: some episodes contain acts of violence, such as stabbing and murder. As well as depictions of period accurate sexism, please be advised when listening, and above all be safe, viewer discretion is advised)

title: Looking Through the Lens of Hopefulness
author: John Passadino
description: Looking Through the Lens of Hopefulness delivers interesting insights on self-awareness, mental health, and spirituality through in-depth interviews with international authors, performers, educators, and philosophers.

title: THE ROUNDTABLE PODCAST
author: Known Records
description:
Welcome to The Round Table Podcast, where we share unfiltered opinions on everything music.


This isn’t your typical music podcast. It’s the kind of conversation that starts in the barbershop, continues in the group chat, and ends with everyone defending their favorite artist.

Whether you’re into classic hip-hop, the newest releases, underground talent, or the business behind the music, this podcast is guaranteed to make you think—and probably disagree with somebody at the table.

title: Imminent Mortalgia
author: Imminent Mortalgia by David
description:
Three songs. One reading.
Each guest chooses the music they would take with them to the end — and the stories behind those choices.
A reflective and sometimes humorous conversation about memory, life and the soundtrack that stays with us.
Hosted by David

title: Girl Talk God’s Way
author: Sakinah
description: Girl Talk God’s Way is a safe place for Christian women to heal and transform as we explore life’s hard topics without judgment or pretense. Honest conversations rooted in biblical truth with grace, compassion, and raw honesty.

title: 20 Minutes with the Mayor
author: City of DeSoto
description:
Get to know the people, projects, and priorities shaping the City of DeSoto in 20 Minutes with the Mayor. Hosted by Mayor Rachel L. Proctor, this engaging podcast offers residents an inside look at city initiatives, community events, economic development, public safety, and the issues that matter most to DeSoto.
Each episode features conversations with city leaders, staff, community partners, and special guests who are helping move DeSoto forward. Whether you're a longtime resident, a new neighbor, or simply interested in local government, you'll gain valuable insight into how decisions are ma

title: Say It With Grace: Unsaid Outloud
author: Deneda R. Lewis
description:
Say It With Grace: Unsaid Out Loud is a welcoming space for honest conversations about healing, faith, relationships, personal growth, and the courage to say the things we've carried in silence.

Hosted by Deneda Lewis, this podcast invites you to pull up a chair, grab your favorite cup of coffee or tea, and join conversations that inspire reflection, encourage healing, and remind you that you're not alone.

Whether you're navigating life's transitions, searching for hope, or simply longing for authentic connection, each episode is shared with compassion, grace, and the belief that even the hardest conversations can lead to growth.

Because sometimes what we need most isn't advice...it's permission to say what's been left unsaid.

Welcome to Say It With Grace: Unsaid Out Loud. I'm so glad you're here.

title: Dark Harbour
author: Andrea and Kerry
description:
Dark Harbour is a Canadian true crime podcast hosted by Andrea and Kerry, exploring unsolved murders, cold cases, missing-person investigations, and the mysteries that continue to raise question and demand answers. 


Through careful research, interviews, and thoughtful storytelling, Andrea and Kerry uncover lesser-known cases while also revisiting crimes that may already be familiar to true crime listeners. Each episode examines the known facts, considers unanswered questions, and looks beyond the headlines to keep the victims, their families, and their communities at the heart of the story.


Season One investigates some of Nova Scotia’s most compelling unsolved cases—because every story deserves to be heard, and every victim deserves to be remembered.

title: The Horses of Castle French
author: Sara Fleming
description: The Horses of Castle French: A memoir of a horse rescue in North Carolina.

title: Freedom Church Limassol
author: Freedom Church Limassol
description: Tune in for a weekly podcast from this week's message at Freedom Church in Limassol Cyprus.

title: Velour After Hours
author: Dawn and JaLisa
description:
Velour After Hours is a late-night podcast where smooth conversations meet unfiltered honesty. Blending culture, relationships, ambition, nightlife, and personal growth, each episode dives deep into the topics people really think about—but rarely say out loud.
With a vibe that’s intimate, bold, and effortlessly cool, Velour After Hours feels like the kind of conversation you’d have when the lights are low and the world is quiet. Expect thought-provoking discussions, candid storytelling, special guest appearances, and moments that are equal parts reflective and entertaining.

title: No Rush Collective
author: No Rush Collective
description: Find what health means to you, there's no rush. All things health, nutrition and fitness.

title: Strength Beyond Muscle Podcast
author: John Sheaffer
description:
Strength Beyond Muscle is where biblical truth meets the science of human excellence.


Hosted by John Sheaffer, creator of Greyskull Barbell and author of books such as The Greyskull LP and STRIP: Lose Fat Find Yourself, the show explores the convergence of practical psychological strategies with the eternal truth in Christ and Scripture. 


A lifelong student of human performance, Neurolinguistic Programming, and the mechanics of personal change, John has helped others change their bodies, their beliefs, their language, and their lives for more than two decades. 


Strength Beyond Muscle examines fitness, faith, state, identity, leadership, and the hidden mechanics behind becoming the person God created you to be.


Strength beyond the barbell. Faith beyond empty words. Mind and body brought home under the command of a soul submitted to God.

title: Awesome Everyday People
author: AskAGuru.com Presents
description: Awesome Everyday People is the show where real users of the AskAGuru app curate their favorite music, books, and shows while promoting themselves and giving a spotlight to worthy artists! New episodes every week!

title: YOU GET ONE TRIP
author: David Wittenburg
description:
Life doesn't follow a script, so neither do we. One day you're celebrating a major promotion or welcoming a kid into the world, and the next you're dealing with a car wreck, an unexpected loss, or a surging water bill that makes absolutely no sense. Hosted completely unscripted, You Get One Trip is a raw, real, and hilarious look at the unspoken laws of daily chaos. We're separating what actually matters from the daily noise we just have to survive. 


Vent to us at vent@yougetonetrip.com.
Website : yougetonetrip.com


Because the bottom line is simple: sh*t happens!

title: On the Corner Leadership Podcast w/ Pastor Coach Aeneas Williams
author: TSC Media
description: Join Pro Football Hall of Famer Pastor Aeneas Williams as he shares practical, biblical wisdom for everyday life. Through Scripture, personal experiences, and Kingdom principles, each episode explores faith, leadership, family, purpose, and spiritual growth. Whether you're new to your faith or have walked with Christ for years, you'll find encouragement and direction for your journey. Learn what it means to hear God's voice, live by faith, and walk in God's purpose for your life.

title: Life Hacks With The Tipman
author: The Tipman
description:
Welcome to Life Hacks with the Tipman!
I've spent decades collecting, testing, and sharing life hacks that actually work. Each week, I'll bring you practical tips and life hacks with high "aah-factor"—that moment when you think "Why didn't I think of that?"
Every tip is personally tested and verified
I focus on legitimate hacks and point out bogus tips in finance, travel, home improvement, gadgets, health, and daily life
Small improvements compound into a happier life. If only 1-2 tips apply to you, share the rest with friends and family. Small tips, big wins!!

title: Brown & Black
author: Jack Rico, Mike Sargent
description: Winner of a 2024 Gold Signal Award, 'Brown & Black' is a podcast at the intersection of race and pop culture. Hosted by Jack Rico (Latino) and Mike Sargent (Black), two nationally recognized film and culture critics, provide a multicultural perspective missing from mainstream media today. Through interviews with filmmakers, artists, and journalists, the show explores the complex relationship between race and entertainment.

title: WYM? Podcast
author: WYM? Podcast
description:
The WYM? Podcast presents engaging conversations covering a diverse range of topics across the entertainment sphere including Music, Film, TV, Radio, & Sports.

Become a supporter of this podcast: https://www.spreaker.com/podcast/wym-podcast--7174831/support.

title: COMMON SCENTS
author: Mistah Syppi
description: MY SHOW IS ABOUT COLOGNES AND PARFUM. IT'S A GUIDE TO BEGINNER PARFUM USERS ON HOW TO SMELL GOOD WITHOUT BREAKING THE BANK OR SMELLING LIKE EVERYONE ELSE.

title: The Sibling Chronicles
author: Caleb and Mia
description: My sister and I talking about experiences and family life. We also cover thoughts and school situations.

title: The Secret Quilters
author: The Secret Quilters
description:
The Secret Quilters is a podcast for the new generation of quilters—those who love the craft but aren’t afraid to question it.

We created this podcast because we kept asking the same question: Why isn’t anyone talking about this?

Quilting is creative, inspiring, and deeply rooted in tradition—but it can also be overwhelming, expensive, and, at times, a little stuck in the past. We believe there’s room for a more honest conversation.

Each week, we explore quilt shops, shop hops, fabrics, and tools—sharing real experiences, thoughtful critiques, and the kind of insights you usually only hear behind closed doors.

title: Growing Wings | מצמיחים כנפיים
author: Growing Wings Foundation
description:
From the frontline to the challenges of civilian life in Israel—hear the personal stories of the men and women who left everything behind to serve. Authentic, raw, and inspiring conversations about sacrifice, resilience, and finding a home.
מהחזית ועד לאתגרי החיים באזרחות בישראל – בואו לשמוע את הסיפורים האישיים של הצעירים והצעירות שעזבו הכל כדי לשרת. שיחות אותנטיות, חשופות ומעוררות השראה על הקרבה, חוסן ומציאת בית.

description: Here you'll find daily motivation from some of the most successful and high achieving people in the world to help encourage you through your journey in life.

title: The Art of Performance Podcast
author: Dean Hammond & Acos Ashioti
description: Weekly interviews and talks on fitness, self-improvement, marketing, business and well-being topics with exciting and influential guests.

title: Dead man Ideas

description: Episode one of Dead Man Ideas introduces unique and thought-provoking concepts inspired by the perspectives of those who have passed. The series explores unconventional ideas and stories, sparking conversation

title: Mustang Studios
author: College Sports Company
description: A Fresh Look at SMU Sports | A College Sports Company Brand

title: Past Fusion Rewind
author: Past Fusion
description: The shows you grew up with have stories that never made it to air. Past Fusion: Classic TV Stories takes you behind the scenes of Gilligan's Island, I Love Lucy, The Golden Girls, MAS*H, Star Trek, and the other series that defined American television — the feuds the studios buried, the careers that took strange turns, and what really happened to the casts after the cameras stopped. Each episode is a fully researched documentary you can listen to anywhere. Your memories are still in there. Come find them.

author: housewellagewell
description: Housewell Agewell, the podcast all about housing justice and older people

author: Nicola Lester

A podcast focused on teaching believers to rest in Jesus, giving hope to skeptics, and pointing all people to the Cross.
*New episode every Monday*
Acts 20:24
