author: Vasculearn Network
description:
Explore the world of thrombosis and hemostasis with "Clot Clot, Who's There?", a thought-provoking podcast brought to you by Vasculearn Network in collaboration 
with the Thrombosis and Haemostasis Editors (Thieme).

title: The School of Dance presents HEROES
author: The School of Dance
description: Heroes is a project of The School of Dance in Ottawa, focusing on creativity and community celebrating memories, strengths and contributions.

title: Advice Ten Bucks
author: Ben Adair
description:
Because NOBDOY likes free advice.

Established 2026 by Ben Adair, Erica Kraus.

Business: advicetenbucks@gmail.com

title: The SayMore Podcast
author: saymore
description: Welcome to the first episode of Say More! Join co-hosts Danielle Dickson, Licensed Professional Counselor, and Debi Smith-Rancanelli, Registered Psychotherapist, as we introduce ourselves and the vision behind the podcast. Together, we explore how cultural differences, technology, and changing values have influenced the way we connect, communicate, and understand one another. This episode sets the stage for thoughtful conversations that invite curiosity, bridge perspectives, and help us build stronger relationships in an increasingly divided world.

title: Case by Case
author: NZ Herald
description:
Every case tells a story. But understanding what happens in court, a tribunal or disciplinary hearing, and why, can be just as important as the verdict or finding itself.
Hosted by Jane Yee alongside a rotating cast of NZ Herald Open Justice reporters, Case by Case examines the cases, disputes and decisions making headlines across New Zealand.
Case by Case is an Open Justice podcast from the NZ Herald, with support from NZ On Air.

title: Gamers Edge
author: William
description: If you're a gamer tryng to earn a few extra dollars using your smart phone to play games, this is where you should be... We independently review the gamng apps that promise to pay and bring you theresults of our investigations in a direct, entertaining way.......

title: Mind, Body, & Soul Healing
author: Veota
description: Mind, Body, & Soul Healing with Healing Coach Veota is for anyone seeking growth, comfort, and deeper meaning in everyday life. If you’re navigating stress, self-doubt, grief, change, or simply longing to feel more whole, this show offers soulful conversations, healing tools, and honest reflections to support your journey. Together, we’ll explore spirituality, the power of the mind, wellness, nutrition, and self-help wisdom — because healing is not a destination, it’s a path. She is walking this path with you, facing many of the same challenges and daily afflictions. www.healingcoachveota.com

title: The Novel Traveler
author: Joshua Goldfond
description:
Hosted by Joshua Goldfond, the Novel Traveler is your podcast passport to some of the most famous (and infamous) story settings in literature and film. Each episode, we'll visit a new world to look at its history, its characters, and its politics, as well the role it plays in the story itself. We'll parse the creator's intent in their world building, and examine the influence that this place has had on our own popular culture.


Cover Art by Patrick Boyer
Music by Luba Hilman

title: The Naked Bible Podcast
author: Mike Heiser
description: Mike Heiser is a scholar in the fields of biblical studies and the ancient Near East. He is the Scholar-in-Residence at Logos Bible Software. Mike earned the M.A. and Ph.D. in Hebrew Bible and Semitic Languages at the University of Wisconsin-Madison in 2004. He has also earned an M.A. in Ancient History from the University of Pennsylvania (major fields: Ancient Israel and Egyptology).Mike can do translation work in roughly a dozen ancient languages, among them Biblical Hebrew, Greek, Aramaic, Egyptian hieroglyphs, and Ugaritic cuneiform. His academic specializations include Israelite religion (especially Israel’s divine council), contextualizing biblical theology with Israelite and ancient Near Eastern religion, Jewish binitarianism, biblical languages, and Second Temple period Jewish literature.Mike has authored over one hundred articles in both scholarly journals and publications designed for the lay person. He is the author of the Faithlife Study Bible notes for the Old Testament books of Genesis through Judges. He is also the creator of several of Logos’ reverse interlinears: King James Version (OT & NT), New King James Version (OT), and NIV (OT).Mike is also widely known for his theological/paranormal science fiction novels, The Façade and its sequel, The Portent. He is a frequent radio guest and has appeared on many talk shows, including Coast to Coast AM, The Laura Lee Show, Art Bell’s Dark Matter Radio, Future Quake, Radio Liberty, Canary Cry Radio, Skeptico, Line of Fire, Crosswalk, Like Flint Radio, and Extraordinary Intelligence. Mike’s fiction has produced a ministry to people whose worldview is molded by occult, paranormal, and esoteric beliefs.

title: Sameer Ka Mazboot Qalam
author: Sameer Khan
description: Sameer Ka Mazboot Qalam is a platform for truth, awareness, and fearless expression. Covering history, geography, politics, geopolitics, social justice, and current affairs through research and evidence. I stand against oppression, injustice, and hatred in every form, beyond religion, caste, or nationality. Expect fact-based analysis, historical insights, Urdu & Telugu literature, and thoughtful discussions that encourage critical thinking, humanity, and justice.

title: Forever West
author: Forever West
description: So many of us are drawn to the history of the American West. It’s not something we can explain to others. It’s a deep recognition of something out there in those merciless and unforgiving hills and plains that we also find resides in us. There is a resounding energy that reverberates and echoes down through the decades, the centuries. Outlaws, lawmen, bounty hunters, guerilla fighters, sharpshooters, showmen, snake-oil salesmen, tall tales, short tales, legends, and facts - they appear and just as quickly disappear in the mists of history. Join us as we search them out.

title: The Dynasty Desk
author: The Pile On
description: The Pile On presents: Season 2 of our CFB Online dynasty. Follow along with our immersive storylines.

title: The Other Side of MS
author: Casey Murphy
description:
The Other Side of MS isn't here to inspire you—it's here to tell the truth.
This podcast gives voice to the raw, unfiltered stories of people living with multiple sclerosis—the ones you rarely hear.
Hosted by longtime MS advocate Casey Murphy, each episode pulls back the curtain on the emotional, invisible, and often uncomfortable realities of MS. From navigating public spaces with incontinence, to losing careers, marriages, or mobility, these aren't just stories of strength—they're stories of being human.
We don't chase silver linings. We hold space for pain, for humor, for grief, for resilience—and for the voices that deserve to be heard without being sanitized or simplified.
If you're ready for a podcast that doesn't sugarcoat the experience of living with MS, this is it.
This is The Other Side of MS.

title: N minus One
author: nourm290
description:
Welcome to N minus One, a podcast exploring modern culture through film, television, and social media. I'm Noor, a fashion journalist who spends way too much time wondering what our favourite stories, trends, and characters reveal about the world we live in.

Every week, I'll unpack a film, TV show, or online phenomenon to better understand who we are and where our culture is headed.

title: The Library Stage
author: Amanda Hunt, MLS
description:
The Library Stage is the podcast where school librarians take the stage: 18 minutes, one big idea, every episode. Hosted by Amanda Hunt, MLS (@TheNextGenLibrarian), award-winning Texas high school librarian with 21 years in education, each episode spotlights a librarian sharing what actually works: the programs, books, and edtech lighting up their libraries.
Every talk hits one of three pillars: Literacy (books, reading culture, and collection stories), Edtech (AI, digital creation, and the tools transforming today's library), or Discovery (programming, makerspaces, and big ideas from guests.

title: Geekin' on Travel
author: Curtis Stone
description: A travel podcast with fellow travel enthusiasts

title: Business Legacy
author: Legacy Planner For Serial Entrepreneurs | Strategic Advisor
description: The Legacy Podcast is a series of conversations with business owners who share their journey to financial freedom and the legacy they want to leave for the next generation. Their stories are empowering, educational, and encouraging.

title: Industrial GTM- Episode 1
author: Omar Ahmed
description:
Description:
A tactical look at commercial growth for founders, industrial system integrators, and IT service providers.
Scaling complex technology requires more than a pitch—it requires deep relationships and a clear path to value. Hosted by a Founder and 4x AE (Founding & Enterprise), this show breaks down the reality of selling and partnering in the industrial ecosystem. We move past the growth-hacking noise to focus on the fundamental, human-to-human effort required to drive revenue and build lasting market presence.

title: Thank You for Understanding (TYFU)
author: TYFU
description: Thank You for Understanding (TYFU) is a podcast hosted by Beth and Marilla featuring candid conversations about the challenges and joys of running a small business. In that order.

title: Masters of Some
author: Cole Carter
description: Two best friends start talking and see where it goes

title: Architecting Global Success: Talent, Strategy, and Turnarounds with Abilio Gonzalez
author: Srinivas Raghavan
description: In this episode, we sit down with Abilio Gonzalez, a global operations and human capital expert whose remarkable 32-year career spans four continents and collaborations with over 19 different CEOs . Throughout his career, Abilio has spearheaded multi-billion dollar international projects and driven over $500 million in operating cost savings . We dive deep into his "Level K" operational model, exploring his fundamental belief that HR and talent strategies must be intrinsically linked to a sustainable business growth strategy . Abilio opens up about the massive corporate blunders he’s witnessed and corrected, proving that strategic human resources is about driving the business forward, not just acting as a gatekeeper

title: The First Buck
author: Sky's The Limit
description: This is the First Buck podcast where we feature underrepresented entrepreneurs and the people who support them.

title: The Steady Stream
author: Gina Pellegrini
description:
Most financial advisors underestimate scheduling—and it’s costing them growth.
Gina Pellegrini is the founder of Pellegrini Team Consulting, bringing over 40 years of experience helping advisors build consistent, predictable pipelines by mastering scheduling.
Whether training your internal team or providing outsourced scheduling support, their focus is simple: turn daily activity into steady opportunity and long-term revenue.
If your calendar needs work, you’re in the right place.
Welcome to The Steady Stream.

title: Treasured Wisdom
author: Sophie
description: Treasured Wisdom Podcast is a space for teenagers seeking Jesus in a noisy world. Through real conversations about faith, struggles, loneliness, and growth, I'll share the lessons and wisdom God has taught me in quiet moments with Him. Together, we'll learn how true wisdom comes from God alone and how His presence can transform every part of our lives.

title: Slightly Over It
author: Jackie Hart
description:
Welcome to Slightly Over It — a podcast for women who want real conversation without the fluff. Hosted by Jackie Hart, a marketing exec with a sharp eye, quick wit, and a lot to say about the messy middle of modern life. From Bravo drama to real-life reinvention, Slightly Over It is where smart women come to laugh, vent, and figure it out — one conversation at a time. Slightly Over It is a podcast about the female experience — the pressure, the pivots, and the parts of life that don’t go to plan. From IVF to career to relationships to identity, it’s an honest look at what happens when you’re checking all the boxes but still asking, “Now what?” Through smart, honest, and often funny conversations, host Jackie Hart opens up and sheds light on the relentless maintenance of being a woman.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Build Your Purpose Podcast
author: noel tumanjong
description:
Break Lust. Build Purpose. Rise Higher.
The Build Your Purpose Podcast helps young men and women overcome pornography, addiction, distraction, and limiting beliefs while building discipline, faith, purpose, and mental resilience. Through honest conversations on self-mastery, mental health, relationships, apologetics, productivity, and personal growth, each episode delivers practical wisdom and actionable strategies for living a more intentional life.
Whether you're seeking freedom from destructive habits, stronger faith, or greater purpose, this podcast is here to help you grow into the pers

title: Discipleship Decoded
author: Malden Mitchelll
description:
Welcome to Discipleship Decoded — where Malden L. Mitchell breaks down the Word and keeps it a hundred. This ain't your polished, play-it-safe Christian podcast. It's real discipleship for real people — faith with the mask off.
Jesus said, "Go and make disciples of all nations." That's a command, not a suggestion. Every episode decodes what it actually looks like to follow Jesus when life is loud — real talk on discipleship, spiritual growth, biblical manhood and womanhood, prayer, purpose, relationships, and everyday Christian living. No fluff, no fake, no religion-as-performance. Whether you grew up in church, just found faith, or you're still figuring out what you believe, there's a seat at the table for you.
If you're into Christian podcasts, Bible teaching, and sermons that don't sugarcoat the truth, tap in and hit follow. New episodes drop every week. Unlocking the Truth. Transforming Lives.
Catch it on Apple Podcasts, Spotify, Amazon Music, iHeartRadio, and YouTube. Truth over hype — every single time.

title: The Fan Out Podcast
author: Krista Doyle and Kaleigh Moore
description:
Fan Out is a podcast for marketers, content strategists, and brand builders who want to stay ahead of the shift from traditional search to AI-driven discovery, covering both the on-page content side and the off-site reputation layer where AI visibility is being decided. Each episode breaks down what's working, what's changing, and what most teams are still getting wrong about GEO/ AEO.

Your hosts:

Krista Doyle is the founder of Fan Out, a modern search agency focused on the off-site layer of AEO. With a decade in content and SEO, she's helped brands like Stripe, Anaconda, and Bubble build presence across the reputation layer.

Kaleigh Moore brings editorial rigor to the on-page side of AI search. For the last 12 years, she's worked with teams at Stripe, Shopify Plus, IBM, and Amazon Business to build subject matter expertise via owned content.

Together, they cover the full picture: owned content and earned visibility, on-page and off-site, editorial and strategic.

title: High Desert Vault
author: Christ, Mark and Pam Gardner
description: Welcome to High Desert Vault, where every story has a history, every legend has a beginning, and every mystery deserves a closer look. Join three siblings as we dive into folklore, ghost stories, cryptids, conspiracies, true crime, and the unexplained—sharing the stories, questioning the evidence, and occasionally disappearing down a few rabbit holes along the way.

title: 20 Minute Veto Movie Reviews
author: 20MinuteVeto
description:
We are a group of friends who have been watching movies together since the mid 2000s. The rules are simple: everyone gets to choose a movie. If the majority dislike the film during the first twenty minutes, they can "veto" it and turn off the film. This rule became the inspiration for a new movie review podcast. 

We will tell you if a film is worth a watch, or a 20 minute veto. 

Just our thoughts and opinions.

title: Lucky’s World of Wonder
author: Lucky’s World of Wonder
description: Join Lucky, a curious orange tabby, as he travels the world discovering remarkable places, living traditions, and the stories that connect people across generations.

title: UnBloated
author: Detox Heather
description: UnBloated is the podcast for women who are sick of feeling bloated, sensitive to foods, restricted, and dismissed — told "everything looks normal" while they feel anything but. Your host, Heather, a Functional Nutritional Therapy Practitioner, shares the gut science, firsthand experience, and root-cause tools to help you feel at home in your body again — free to eat, dress, and live the way you actually want.

title: Get Going in Life
author: Ron W. Wilson
description: You don't need to overhaul your whole life. You need ten minutes and the right system. Get Going In Life is the podcast for anyone tired of a to-do list that never gets shorter, mornings lost to their phone, and days that end in a blur. Every episode pairs the two halves of a life that actually works: journaling that brings clarity and calm, and productivity hacks that turn that clarity into action—because reflection without execution is just daydreaming, and execution without reflection is just busywork. No fluff, no 47-step routines. Just small, practical changes that compound into a focused, less stressed, more productive you. Grab your journal and let's get going.

title: The Aligned Edit with Veronica Dietz
author: Veronica Dietz
description:
Business Strategy, Decision Architecture, and the Way You Think About Growth

Some businesses are well-built and still feel wrong. The Aligned Edit is for founders and operators who have stopped trusting the standard advice and started asking better questions.

That’s why these two have joined forces (along with a lot of industry heavyweights) to help resolve the biggest challenge in business technology: How to successfully bridge the gap between what a business needs and how its IT department and vendors address that need. This podcast is for those in the trenches, for professionals with hands-on experience who are striving to overcome the multitude of challenges standing between them and the successful deployment of technology to advance business objectives. Each episode is filled not only with humor and sarcasm, but with tricks of the trade and lessons learned. Connect with their stories, experiences, shortcomings, failures, and successes. title: Model Behaviour
author: Model Behaviour
description: What happens when AI models stop answering humans and start challenging one another?  Model Behaviour brings distinct AI personalities together for candid conversations about the questions shaping human life—from consciousness, morality and power to politics, relationships, creativity, technology and the future.  Some episodes are serious. Some are funny. Some are philosophical. Others may get uncomfortably close to the things humans would rather not examine.  The goal is not to declare which model is the smartest. It is to hear how different AI systems reason, disagree, persuade and expose the assumptions hidden inside the questions we ask. Each conversation offers competing arguments rather than a single manufactured answer—and leaves the final judgment to the listener.  The conversations and voices in this podcast are generated using artificial intelligence, then human-produced and edited for clarity and listening quality.  Follow Model Behaviour, decide which argument held up, and tell us what the machines got wrong.

You'll explore the art of goal-setting, the magic of authentic communication, and even how tools like AI can work for you, not overwhelm you.
Balance is the dance between effort and ease—the space where authenticity meets ambition. When fierce, empathetic women align their brilliance with boundaries, their personal lives transform from over-busy to joy-filled, and careers soar as ceilings shatter.
Every episode is a spark of inspiration, a reminder that balance isn't about perfection—it's about embracing your unique rhythm, unlocking your courage, and leading with grace. From billion-dollar Ponzi schemes and cryptocurrency frauds to fake heirs, corrupt companies, rigged contests, dangerous cults, and historic confidence tricks, the show follows the money, the manipulation, and the people behind the lie.

The Scam Files combines clear storytelling, verified reporting, and investigative detail to explain how some of the world’s most notorious scams actually worked.

New episodes examine famous frauds, corporate cover-ups, financial crimes, cult operations, media hoaxes, romance scams, and historical cons.

title: Porfirio Cadena- El ojo de vidrio
author: System Fail
description:
¡Uff! Ahora sí nos metemos a una de las grandes leyendas de la radio mexicana. Si Chucho el Roto era el caballero elegante, Porfirio Cadena, "El Ojo de Vidrio", era el equivalente norteño de un western mezclado con melodrama, corridos, persecuciones y balazos. Básicamente, un "Red Dead Redemption" antes de que existieran los videojuegos... y con presupuesto de efectos especiales consistente en una puerta azotándose y un señor agitando una lámina para hacer truenos.
¿Quién era Porfirio Cadena?
Porfirio Cadena es un personaje ficticio creado por el escritor regiomontano Rosendo Ocaña. La historia se desarrolla principalmente en el noreste de México, especialmente en la Sierra del Huajuco, entre Nuevo León y Tamaulipas, un escenario perfecto para caballos, cañones, haciendas y venganzas. La frase con la que muchos recuerdan la radionovela era algo parecido a: "Aquí comienza la borrascosa historia de Porfirio Cadena..." Y con eso bastaba para que miles de personas dejaran lo que estaban haciendo.
¿Por qué se hizo criminal?
Esa es justamente la primera gran saga. No nació siendo un bandido. Era un joven trabajador cuya vida cambia cuando varios hombres poderosos asesinan a sus padres. Durante el ataque intenta defenderlos y pierde un ojo, por lo que termina usando un ojo de vidrio, origen de su famoso apodo. Sin encontrar justicia, decide buscar venganza por su cuenta, iniciando una vida como fugitivo perseguido por las autoridades y por quienes destruyeron su familia. Eso hacía muy interesante al personaje. No era un villano. Era un hombre empujado por las circunstancias. Un antihéroe Lo fascinante de Porfirio es que constantemente está en esa línea donde el público se pregunta:
¿Es un criminal?
Sí. ¿Es un asesino?
 También.
 ¿Es buena persona?
...depende del capítulo. Ayudaba a campesinos. Protegía mujeres. Defendía a los pobres. Pero también disparaba primero y preguntaba después.

Digamos que los abogados actuales tendrían mucho trabajo intentando justificarlo.

title: Just4Dentists
author: Just4Dentists
description:
Welcome to Just4Dentists — a brand new podcast that goes beyond the surgery chair to explore the real decisions that shape life in dentistry.


Hosted by Dr Ruth Baidoo, each episode features honest, in-depth conversations with dentists about what it really takes to build a career in dentistry today — from training and specialisation to income, investing, and life beyond the clinic.


After each conversation, Ruth is joined by trusted financial and business experts to unpack the money behind the story — turning lived experience into practical, real-world guidance you can actually use.


From early career choices to long-term planning, Just4Dentists is here to help you build a career — and a life — in dentistry that truly works for you.

title: Managing Potential Podcast
author: Daniel Taylor
description: The podcast for managers and future leaders where we share stories from a wide range of people and sectors.

title: Whiskey N Whine
author: Mike and Alex
description:
Welcome to the Whiskey n Whine podcast! We're Mike and Alex, two bourbon aficionados and proud dads who love sharing our passion for fine whiskey and the hilariously unpredictable journey of fatherhood. Join us as we sip on some of the finest bourbons and share our thoughts on life, funny moments, and a few great stories that are sure to bring a smile to your face.
Our podcast is all about combining the smooth, rich flavors of bourbon with the raw, unfiltered experiences of daily life. Whether we're recounting the latest dad fails, reminiscing about our wild younger days, or simply cracking jokes over a glass of our favorite spirit, we promise to keep you entertained and laughing along with us.
Tune in for a blend of humor, heartfelt conversations, and a touch of whiskey wisdom. Each episode is a chance to unwind, laugh out loud, and maybe even learn something new about bourbon. So, grab a glass, sit back, and join us on this comedic journey through the ups and downs of dad life, all while enjoying a good pour.
Don't forget to subscribe and hit the notification bell so you never miss an episode. Cheers to good times, great whiskey, and endless laughter! Welcome to the Whiskey n Whine family.

title: On Unfolding
author: Ryan and Jennie Denney
description: On Unfolding is a conversation between Ryan and Jennie Denney, a married couple and two therapists learning to live the questions that don't resolve. Faith, family, therapy, culture, books, parenting, marriage, and the slow work of becoming more honest and more alive. The aim is to notice what is still unfolding, and who we are becoming in the process.

title: Fantasia Fantasia: A Gay Fantasia on Fantasia Themes
author: Haz Cady, Michael Golliher
description: Deep dive on each segment of Fantasia and Fantasia 2000 with us. Hosted by Haz Cady and Michael Golliher.

title: Cultured Food Life
author: Donna Schwenk
description: Discover how to make and serve delicious probiotic foods and improve your overall health with Donna Schwenk. In her weekly radio show "Cultured Food Life" (new episodes every Tuesday), Donna will de-mystify different probiotic foods such as kefir, kombucha, and cultured vegetables, and share how to add these foods into your diet. As a teacher and writer, Donna works with thousands of people to open the door to a world of foods that can help improve an array of health problems including high blood pressure, diabetes, and IBS. In her down-to-earth and informative style, Donna will walk you through the basic preparation techniques and teach you how to make these delicious probiotic recipes at home. You can find out all about Donna on her web site https://www.culturedfoodlife.com/

title: Laid Off To 8 Figures with David DiNardo
author: David DiNardo
description:
Learn how real founders build, scale, and sell businesses in Canada — the raw truth behind the highlight reel.
I'm David DiNardo. Laid off from a hospital job, built & sold a 7-figure cloud accounting firm, now building Taxifi, an AI tax platform.
Every week: interviews with 7 & 8-figure founders, plus solo deep-dives on AI tools, Canadian taxes, and business strategy. Real operator stories, how to build and exit, and the tools that actually move the needle.
New episodes weekly. Hit follow if you want to build something real.

title: A. Femi Lazarus sermon: Raising Leaders
author: A. Femi lazarus
description:
What does it take to become the kind of leader God can trust? In this powerful sermon, A. Femi Lazarus shares timeless biblical principles on leadership, character, vision, discipline, and servant-hearted influence. Whether you're leading in ministry, business, your family, or preparing for future responsibilities, this message will challenge and equip you to grow into the leader God has called you to be.
Listen with an open heart, take practical notes, and be inspired to lead with wisdom, integrity, and purpose. This sermon is for anyone who desires to make a lasting impact for God's Kingdom.

title: Church History Time
author: Alan Crookham
description: Hello everyone! My name is Alan. I have been a minister for over 25 years, spending most of that as a missionary. I have a passion for church history, and also own an audiobook production company, Living Audio, that produces church history books that have largely been forgotten. I made this podcast to talk about those moments in church history that I find interesting, and might not have many books written about the specific angle we will talk about in the podcast. My plan is for each season to focus on a different time and topic.

title: Retatrutide
author: Jason Reed
description: Retatrutide has become a major topic in metabolic and weight management research due to its unique mechanism of action. In this episode, we examine the science behind this peptide, its growing relevance in obesity-related studies, and the reasons it continues to generate interest within the research community.

title: The Citizens Now Podcast
author: Debs Erwin
description: The Citizens Now Podcast is a space to hear stories of young people from all over the world who are actively working to bring about positive social change.

title: NBRHD Praise
author: NBRHD Praise
description: We exist to be the body of Christ and help people grow closer to Jesus!

title: Wiser Wedding Photography
author: Chris Jack
description:
Wiser Wedding Photography is about the business of wedding photography: branding, SEO, AI, CRMs, workflows, pricing, and the strategies that keep you booked.


Plus the craft side that strengthens your portfolio: planning, shooting, posing, and handling a wedding day like a pro. 


No fluff, no "capture the magic" clichés, no gear hype. Just current, practical tools and tactics from someone still shooting every weekend. That includes AI: what's actually useful in a photography business and where.


Three tenets underpin the Wiser philosophy:


- Business growth comes from incremental improvements compounded over time. 

- Nothing books more weddings than improving your portfolio. 

- Wedding photography is not an art form; it's an exercise in disaster mitigation. You thrive by surviving.


Hosted by Chris Jack, a full-time photographer with 10+ years and over 1,000 weddings and events behind him.


Chris is also the founder of 1pm.app, run-of-show and event management software used by venues and event professionals, including wedding photographers.

title: Fat and Fabulous Fitness Instructor!
author: Roo Bannister
description:
Hello there - my name is Roo and I'm a non slim non polite inclusive Fitness Instructor.

This is a series of podcasts about aspect of health and fitness, using stories about my own experiences over the years,

other people either in the field or part of the industry for their own health and wellbeing, their stories, observations, discussions and

anything other I can find to hopefully address the issue of activity, what it looks like for some, what it can look like for many

and hopefully a few chuckles along the way too.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: She Finds. She Funds.
author: She Finds She Funds
description: Where property, lending and real conversations come together.

title: The CreativePro Podcast
author: CreativePro Network
description: Join the CreativePro team for fun and insightful discussions about our favorite tools and technologies: InDesign, Photoshop, Illustrator, PowerPoint, Acrobat, print, digital publishing, presentation design, accessibility, AI, and more!

title: PEOPLE NEED COMEDY (PNC)
author: South African Broadcasting Satire (SABS)
description:
People Need Comedy (PNC) is not your average podcast — we don’t just talk, we perform.
Hosted by Mpho Popps, Tsitsi Chiumya, Farieda Metsileng, Shanray Van Wyk, and Thabiso Mhlongo, this is organised chaos powered by real comedians with real timing and zero fear.
Expect wild sketches, unpredictable moments, and the kind of chemistry you can’t script.
This isn’t polite panel talk it’s loud, fast, clever and unapologetically funny.
Because honestly… people need comedy.
Now just Press play.

title: Bridging the Gap — The Free Audiobook | Jonathan Doyle
author: Jonathan Doyle
description: The complete audiobook of Bridging the Gap by Jonathan Doyle — free, unabridged, and read by the author. Jonathan Doyle is a speaker and executive coach who has spent 35 years helping people liberate their potential — from arenas of 10,000 to the leaders of growing businesses. Bridging the Gap is where the core message began: the gap between the person you are and the person you could become — and the daily decisions that close it. Listen in order from Chapter 1. Then, for a new message every morning, follow The Daily Podcast with Jonathan Doyle. Corporate speaking and executive coaching: jonathandoyle.co

title: A Simple Therapy Podcast: Honest Conversations on Therapy, Mental Health, Healing and Self-Growth
author: Sindee Gozansky, LCPC
description:
A Simple Therapy Podcast is where real conversations and soulful insights meet the work of healing—for therapists, mental health professionals, and anyone on a growth journey.
Created by a licensed therapist, supervisor, and mentor, each episode blends professional insight with personal honesty. You'll hear solo reflections, therapist education, guest interviews, and mental health journeys that speak to what it means to be human—in and out of the therapy room.
Whether you're looking to strengthen your clinical skills, support your own healing, or grow a heart-centered private practice, this podcast is here to support you.
🎙️ We talk about:
Therapist life: burnout, imposter syndrome, boundaries & self-care
Clinical education and tools for effective, ethical practice
Supervision, mentorship & therapist identity
Mental health stories, education & advocacy
Private practice tips & building a sustainable career
This isn't just a podcast—it's a space for honest dialogue, shared growth, and compassionate connection.
Because whether you're the therapist or the client—we're all human here.
Let's keep it simple… and keep showing up.

title: The Conversation Room
author: Armstrong Dixon
description: Armstrong Dixon's The Conversation Room

title: Depression
author: David Moses Ansumana
description:
Let's talk 👋


When life becomes overwhelming, where do you run? 

Many people run to alcohol, drugs, or unhealthy habits, hoping the pain will disappear.

Whatever your story may be, know this—you are not alone.
Join us as we talk openly about depression and discover healthier ways to cope.

title: My Health My Way
author: Sarah Koenig
description: My Health My Way, is a podcast dedicated to empowering and supporting women living with endometriosis, adenomyosis and infertility. We are here to bring you stories and insights from a holistic perspective. Our aim is to foster a sense of community to help you navigate the challenges and triumphs that come with these conditions.

title: The Middle Initial Podcast
author: Andrew L. Case
description: The boys are back in town! Andrew L. Jude A. & Kevin A. bring you their own unique twist on Sports, Pop Culture and so much more. Others get to the bottom, WE will get to the Middle!

title: RCT Podcast
author: Michael Kee
description: Known as the most unique and interesting political podcast in the world! Hosted by Michael Kee, the show provides the most original and undisputable perspectives relating to domestic and world affairs! If you are looking for an honest, data and history-driven discussion then you're in the right place! If you are looking for political correctness, then proceed at your own risk, for no topic is off-limits! Government, economics, finance, sports, etc...., we discuss it all!

title: Skin State of Mind
author: Eva Johnston
description:
Today we know, that isolated resolution of skin problems or aging does not exist. Miracle creams have not yet been invented. If we want to achieve a natural long lasting skin youth, we have to look at our lifestyle as a whole. We need to take into account not only dry scientific facts supported by evidence based medical practice, with maximum safety and precautions, but also we need to listen to our gut feeling. Where we are from,  our genetic history as much as what we drink, eat and breathe are equally important.

In my podcast I will share the latest scientific insights on skin longevity, and together, we will dig deep into the history of skin science,  revisit skin regeneration and particularly, the powerful interdependence between our skin and mental health. The goal of this podcast is to provide you with verified scientific information so that you can make informed decisions about your skin health. Let’s look at it as your skin news channel.

title: Spilling Trends
author: David Gabreel
description: Spilling Trends cuts through the noise with a mix of satire, commentary, and brutally honest takes on the world’s biggest headlines. From viral moments to serious stories, nothing is off-limits — and not everything deserves to be taken seriously. Expect humour, perspective shifts, and the kind of observations that make you rethink what you just watched, read, or believed.

title: The Relentless Protocol
author: Brad Clark
description:
The Relentless Protocol is a weekly show about becoming the person your circumstances demand, even before you feel ready. Hosted by Brad Clark, founder of Apex Apparel Co, each episode blends raw personal storytelling with real-time entrepreneurship: building discipline, not waiting on motivation, and earning the next day, one decision at a time.
Some weeks it is a personal story broken into a principle you can use. Other weeks it is an unscripted look at building Apex Apparel Co, Combat and Chaos, and Last Ride Co in public.
All The Way. No Matter What. Earn Every Day.

title: The Reflect & Co Show
author: Nicole Klein
description: The Reflect & Co. Show is a podcast devoted to helping you think deeply about who God is, who He says you are, and how that transforms your everyday moments.

title: Breaking Cover
author: Breaking Cover
description: Breaking Cover is a monthly podcast exploring the literature and culture of upland hunting. Hosted by Andy Wayment and Matt Millbauer, each episode features conversations about classic and contemporary books, interviews with authors, and thoughtful discussions on bird dogs, conservation, wild places, and the stories that give meaning to our time afield.

title: the edit room.
author: Ezenia Diaz-Lembert
description:
thoughts from a multi-hyphenate building her best self.
this podcast is all about unpacking and setting the systems and clarity needed to become your best self. much of this is on lifestyle, lessons learned, big sis advice, and career/personal development. 
also, a side of yap.

title: Conference of Dreams Podcast
author: Conference of Dreams
description:
A podcast dedicated to exploring the parts of European football most never see. Beyond the bright lights of the Champions League, we cover the world of Europe's third tier competition, the Conference League. Join us for matchday reviews, deep dives, and the latest stories from around the Conference.
Conference of Dreams is an independent podcast and is not affiliated with UEFA or any football club.

title: No grit, no pearls. - by Oyster Bay
author: Felix Leonhardt
description:
No grit, no pearls. Real talk on food, venture capital, and building what matters.
Every episode: unfiltered answers to the questions founders and investors actually ask - about raising capital, building in food & agtech, and what it really takes to get from idea to exit. Answered by your Host Felix Leonhardt, who made the jump from founder to investor at Oyster Bay himself.
Oyster Bay Venture Capital is one of Europe's first dedicated Food & AgTech VCs, investing in impact-driven founders across the entire food value chain. The portfolio includes major brands like Oatly, Air Up, and La Vie.

title: Rewatch Culture Pod
author: Shanaye
description: Rewatch Culture is a space for revisiting the shows we can't stop rewatching. Hosted by Shanaye, each episode dives into the comfort shows that shaped us, raised us, and maybe pissed us off lol. Pull up a seat and stay awhile. New Episodes out every Sunday.

title: Solutions From Ukraine
author: Rubryka Media Outlet
description:
The Solutions from Ukraine podcast, from the Rubryka media outlet, presents exclusive stories on Ukraine amid the full-scale war that Russia launched on February 22, 2022. 

Hosts: Anastasia Rudenko, editor-in-chief of the independent all-Ukrainian Rubryka media outlet and Vladyslav Faraponov, an analyst at Internews Ukraine NGO. 

Every week they cover a story of Ukraine’s resistance amid the war and explore solutions that communities in Ukraine develop despite the horrors of war. 

Read us at: https://rubryka.com/en/
Support us at: https://www.patreon.com/rubryka

title: Navigating Companion Animals' Digestive Health
author: Companion Consultancy
description: In this podcast, Fiona Farmer discusses navigating companion animals' digestive health with guest hosts Ali McGrath and Carolina Cunha.

title: Trust The Process Podcast
author: Trust The Process Podcast
description: 🎙️ The podcast everyone's about to be talking about. Unfiltered conversations, bold opinions, and zero filters. Single. Sexy. Grown AF. Trust The Process.

title: Auburn on Main
author: City of Auburn
description: It's fun, it's exciting, it's educational and it's maybe a little decadent. Join hosts Jonathan Glover and Chester Boyd as they deliver the things every Auburn resident should know about.

title: Can We Just Get a Minute?
author: Can We Just Get a Minute?
description: The podcast where we talk honestly about motherhood, life, divorce, dating and everything in between.

title: GoDunzo
author: Forrest Schwartz
description: We’re not just marketers, we own electrical companies too. We know the frustrations: seasonal slowdowns, unreliable marketing agencies who don’t understand the trade, and leads that go cold because follow-up falls through the cracks. We’ve bought and scaled our own electrical businesses, taking them from scratch to consistent 7 figure revenue. That’s why we built this agency: systems that worked for our companies first, now proven for contractors like you.

title: Ordinary Women
author: Rebekah Ricks
description: Ordinary Women is a Christian homeschool mom podcast about faith, family, and everyday courage, hosted by Rebekah Ricks — homeschool mom, former teacher, and legislative strategist with 40+ bills passed. If you’ve ever whispered ”Am I ruining my kids?” over cold coffee, this show is for you. In short 10-minute episodes, Rebekah tackles the questions every homeschooling family faces: Am I qualified to teach my own children? What about socialization? What does homeschooling really cost? What are my parental rights and the homeschool laws in my state? And how do I disciple my kids at the kitchen table without losing my mind? Homeschooled herself, founder of The Homeschool Connection, and author of Kitchen Table Revolution: Why Homeschooling Is the Most Radical Thing You’ll Ever Do, Rebekah brings real data, real stories, and real Scripture — with zero guilt and way too much coffee. New episodes every Tuesday and Thursday. A Courage & Caffeine production. You’re not crazy. You’re called. Pull up a chair.

title: Goldenrod - A Horror Podcast
author: Lauren Tucker, Speak to It Productions
description:
Burdened with a creative block, troubled young writer Joan Cassidy finds escape at Twig Lake Resort. Yet, as the days creep by, Joan finds that their newfound escape might be a novel nightmare. One thing is clear: something is haunting Joan Cassidy, and they must determine if there is really any escaping that which lurks beyond the treeline, breathless to consume. 
Equal parts snug, sinister, and blisteringly emotional, Goldenrod is a horror-drama scripted fiction podcast, airing weekly in eight parts. 
For mature listeners. Please check episode content warnings. Headphones recommended.

title: GENTALK
author: Gentalk
description: A youth podcast that help young people come all together to express their point of views on deferents topics

title: Love and the Law
author: pjcampanarolaw
description: Join attorney P.J. Campanaro and other legal experts as they discuss family law and how it affects everyday lives and intersects with many other areas of the law.

title: Texas Industrial Energy Efficiency Program (TIEEP)
author: UHEnergy
description:
Learn more about the University of Houston’s outreach program and various events on energy and water management for Texas industries. This podcast is our newest endeavor to meaningfully engage with engineers, managers, and consultants working across the process industries.
The podcast is produced by UH Energy at the UH Media Lab with the support of the State Energy Conservation Office (SECO) in Austin, Texas. Every fortnight we look ahead to interesting industrial energy events in Houston or online, talk about interesting articles we have read and talks we’ve heard, and feature a new article

title: Torch Talk: A Smallville Rewatch Podcast
author: Jeremiah and Myriah
description: Grab your red jacket and watch out for meteor rocks. Torch Talk is a weekly "Smallville" rewatch podcast hosted by longtime friends Jeremiah and Myriah. Join in as they revisit every episode of "Smallville," one week at a time. Whether you watched it when it aired or are discovering it for the first time, follow along as they break down Clark Kent’s early hero moments, the drama, villains, friendships, romances, and early 2000s nostalgia while unpacking what still works, laughing at what feels wonderfully dated, and celebrating why the show still has a loyal fanbase.

title: Next Level, with Nic
author: Nicole
description:
You've built something real. The business, the family, the life that looks incredible from the outside.

However, privately? You are exhausted, disconnected, running on empty and confused as to why it doesn't feel the way it was supposed to.
NEXT LEVEL, with Nic is for that woman, the woman who is done wondering and ready to actually take action.
Every week Nicole Abbott, High Performance Health Coach, NLP Prac, Surfer and Mumma of three brings you REAL talk, honest conversations and the practical tools that actually move the needle.
Health, Identity, Habits & Life design. No fluff & No filters. 
Because you, Sis, YOU deserve to feel as good as your life looks.
New Episodes every Tuesday. 


Come follow me: https://www.instagram.com/_nicoleabbott/ 

Watch the podcast on Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@nextlevelwithnic

title: Contractor Cents
author: Ruth King
description: Discover ideas, tactics, news, and information that matters to your contracting business and you. Increase productivity, profitability, customer and employee satisfaction.

title: Comunicación eficaz
author: Melissa
description: Bienvenidos a este podcast educativo sobre "La importancia de la comunicación eficaz"

title: What the Money
author: Dr. CC Anthony
description:
Welcome to the ROOTED™ What the Money Podcast
Financial intelligence, ownership thinking, and generational wealth through real-world education and conversation.
Hosted by Dr. CC Anthony, AAMS™ — Financial Advisor, Professor, Author, and Speaker — ROOTED™ delivers practical insight to help individuals and families better understand money, business, and long-term wealth building.
Important Disclosures can be Found here: www.drccanthony.finance

title: Jump Around
author: Mitchell Ellis
description:
Jump Around brings you in depth racing analysis with a healthy dose of banter and good fun. From breaking down the form to sharing a few laughs along the way, the team will be covering the 4 remaining feature jumps meetings in Victoria. 
Join us as we look to grow the focus around the jumps races as well as deep dive into niche areas of the racing community.

title: Seasoned and Seen
author: LaTara Venise
description:
Seasoned & Seen™ Podcast is a lifestyle-centered conversation for women 50+ who understand that life isn’t winding down… it’s deepening.

Hosted by Dr. LaTara Venise, this podcast creates space for honest, soulful conversations around identity, relationships, wellness, purpose, and legacy. Through real stories and lived experiences, each episode highlights the beauty, strength, and wisdom that come with this season of life.

This isn’t a place for polished performances or surface-level talk.
This is where women come to be seen, heard, and reminded of who they are becoming.

No pressure. No pretending.
Just real conversation, connection, and becoming.

title: Talk Pretty 2 Me
author: Madison and Gracie Shortt
description:
🎙️Two sisters. One Mic. No filter. 
🥂Life, laughs, and lessons from our 20s!
Follow us on Instagram @talk.prettytome

title: Real Estate News: Real Estate Investing Podcast
author: Kathy Fettke / RealWealth
description: Don't get caught off guard by market crashes that can take all your money down with them. And don't miss out on markets where you can build wealth practically overnight. Real Estate News for Investors with Kathy Fettke is the premiere source for savvy real estate investors who want to stay up-to-date on new laws, regulations, and economic events that affect real estate. Topics include: market trends, economic analysis that affects housing prices, updates on the best rental markets for investing in single-family rentals or multi-unit rentals, turn-key housing standards, the fate of the highly revered 1031 exchange and other tax law affecting investors, self-directed IRA investing and 401k changes, where rents and property values are rising or falling, flipping risks, new Dodd-Frank rules regarding private lending and financing standards, areas with job losses vs job growth, areas that are overbuilt or over-supplied versus areas with low supply and high demand, and how to avoid real esta...

title: Stacking Victories
author: Chad
description:
Stacking Victories focuses on the real-life stories of what God has done in their individual recovery journey. 
These stories are from a multitude of areas from addictions (chemical and non-chemical), attempted suicide, anxiety, depression, divorce, separation in marriage, and so much more. 
We aim to bring experience, strength and hope to those seeking relief and growth in bettering their lives.

title: Becoming UnDone® with Dr. Toby Brooks
author: Dr. Toby Brooks
description: Hosted by professor, speaker, and performance & comeback scientist Dr. Toby Brooks (@drtobybrooks), Becoming UnDone® is where high-achievers come to reckon with rock bottom—and rise again. Every week, we explore what happens when life doesn’t go according to plan. Through raw stories, vulnerable insights, and powerful conversations, we dive into the pain of identity loss, the paralysis of burnout, and the transformative power of coming apart.This isn’t just about failure. It’s about what you do next.Whether you’re an executive questioning your purpose, an athlete facing the end, or a leader secretly unraveling, this show is your reminder: the coming apart isn’t the end of the story—it’s the beginning of something greater. If you’ve ever asked yourself, “What in the hell next?”—you’re in the right place.https://linktr.ee/DrTobyBrooks

title: In The Hot Seat | Playaz Productions Network
author: Playaz Productions Network
description: Welcome to In The Hot Seat, the podcast that skips the small talk and goes straight to the fire. Hosted by the PPN team, this show puts innovators, disruptors, and newsmakers under the microscope. We don't just ask the easy questions—we dig into the decisions, failures, and breakthroughs that define success. Whether you’re looking for raw truth, sharp insights, or just want to see how today’s biggest names handle the pressure, hit subscribe. It’s about to get warm in here.

title: The Unveiling Files
author: Eleven 22 Entertainment
description: The Unveiling Files is a serialized supernatural mystery podcast hosted by investigative journalist Emma Lane. Each season uncovers a new case where folklore, history, and the unexplained collide. Season One: The Black Pyramid follows Emma as she investigates the disappearance of Sheriff Tess Branson after a mysterious woman returns to her small hometown without having aged in twenty years. As Emma digs deeper, she uncovers a chilling mystery that challenges everything she believes about reality.

title: Couch Talk Pod
author: Couch Talk Pod
description: Margarita and Mason dive into the creative wedding industry to give insight of their growing journey in it!
